source.note: Backlog trends are generated from Jira historical JQL snapshots (status and priority as-of each date). Business Unit UAT flow is generated from Jira issue changelogs. PR activity is sourced from GitHub pull requests and attributed by committed repo-to-team mapping.

prActivity.caveat: Counts are sourced from GitHub pull requests and attributed by committed repo-to-team mapping. Opened counts use non-draft PR createdAt, merged counts use mergedAt, sprint trend points render only closed sprints, and review-to-merge time uses the latest submitted GitHub review to mergedAt.
